subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who art near and dear to the Glorious Threshold! Give thanks to God for having been ushered into His Kingdom
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
